parsed.production_notes: The video uses a static split-screen layout. The top panel features an AI-generated avatar with a synthetic robot body and a hyper-smooth face. The bottom panel shows a human actor, though the lighting and static framing suggest it might also be heavily processed or AI-assisted.

characters.appearance: Young female face with fair complexion and dark hair styled in an updo. Her body is a futuristic, glossy white and grey robotic suit with glowing blue accents.
characters.wardrobe: Sleek metallic robot body with blue glowing elements.

characters.appearance: Indian woman in her 30s with a medium build and wheatish complexion. She has dark hair loosely tied back and wears a red bindi.
characters.wardrobe: Red short-sleeved blouse and a cream saree with red floral patterns. Simple gold chain.

scenes.setting: Top: Sci-fi lab. Bottom: Rustic kitchen.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is centered in a medium close-up. She has a human-like face and a glossy white and grey robotic body with blue accents. The background is a dark, futuristic sci-fi lab with out-of-focus circular blue lights. The lighting is cool and moody. She maintains a calm expression.

Character B is centered in a medium close-up. She wears a red blouse, a cream floral saree, and a red bindi. The background is a warm, sunlit rustic kitchen with stainless steel utensils on shelves. The lighting is natural and bright. Her expression is earnest.

scenes.visual_description: A static split-screen layout divides the frame horizontally. The top half shows Character A in a dark, futuristic setting. The bottom half shows Character B in a bright, rustic kitchen. Both characters face forward, engaging in a simulated conversation. The framing and camera angle remain completely fixed throughout.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: टीचर ने बोला घर में इंग्लिश में बात करो, बच्चे से मैं क्या बात करूं? मुझे तो अपना नाम भी इंग्लिश में लिखना नहीं आता। [The teacher said to speak in English at home, what should I talk to the child about? I don't even know how to write my name in English.]

Character A says: देखिए आपको पूरी इंग्लिश नहीं आनी चाहिए। आपको इतनी आनी चाहिए कि... [Look, you don't need to know complete English. You should know enough that...]

Character A says: बेटे का होमवर्क समझ आए, टीचर से बात हो सके, स्कूल का लेटर पढ़ सको। [You can understand your son's homework, talk to the teacher, read the school's letter.]

Character B says: पर मैं तो पढ़ी-लिखी नहीं हूं, मुझसे होगा? [But I am not educated, will I be able to do it?]

Character A says: बिल्कुल होगा। इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप में जनरल इंग्लिश शो है। सब कुछ हिंदी में समझाया है। पढ़ना नहीं है। सिर्फ वीडियो देखना है और सुनना है। 'हेलो' से बात शुरू करें। पहला वीडियो है, एक लाख से ज्यादा लोग देख चुके हैं। [Absolutely. The English Seekho app has a General English show. Everything is explained in Hindi. You don't have to read. Just watch the video and listen. Start the conversation with 'Hello'. It's the first video, more than one lakh people have watched it.]

The bottom half shows Character B in a bright, rustic kitchen. Both characters face forward, engaging in a simulated conversation. The framing and camera angle remain completely fixed throughout.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: पर स्कूल में तो बहुत मुश्किल इंग्लिश होती है ना? [But the English in school is very difficult, right?]

Character A says: आपको स्कूल वाली इंग्लिश नहीं सीखनी। पहले बेसिक्स सीखो। रोज़ के 10 ईज़ी सेंटेंसेस। रोज़ के छोटे सेंटेंसेस। 'माय नेम इज़ सावित्री', 'माय सन स्टडीज़ इन क्लास वन'। इतना काफी है शुरू करने के लिए। [You don't have to learn school English. Learn the basics first. 10 easy sentences daily. Short daily sentences. 'My name is Savitri', 'My son studies in class one'. This is enough to start.]

Character B says: और बेटे को कैसे हेल्प करूंगी होमवर्क में? [And how will I help my son with his homework?]

Character A says: गुड मैनर्स के इंग्लिश वर्ड्स वीडियो है, 'प्लीज़', 'थैंक यू', 'सॉरी'। ये वर्ड्स बेटे के स्कूल में भी हैं। दोनों साथ में देखो। बेटे को लगेगा मम्मी भी सीख रही है, वो और मोटिवेटेड होगा। [There is a video on English words for good manners, 'Please', 'Thank you', 'Sorry'. These words are also in your son's school. Watch it together. The son will feel that mummy is also learning, he will be more motivated.]

The bottom half shows Character B in a bright, rustic kitchen. Both characters face forward, engaging in a simulated conversation. The framing and camera angle remain completely fixed throughout.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: मुझे शर्म आती है। इतनी बड़ी हो के बेसिक इंग्लिश सीख रही हूं। [I feel ashamed. Learning basic English at this age.]

Character A says: ऐप में कोई नहीं देख रहा, कोई जज नहीं करेगा। और एआई कोच है, 24 घंटे अवेलेबल। आपसे हिंदी में बात करके इंग्लिश सिखाएगी। 500 बार गलत बोलो, 500 बार सुधारेगी। कभी नहीं बोलेगी कि पढ़ी-लिखी नहीं हो, तुझसे नहीं होगा। [No one is watching in the app, no one will judge. And there is an AI coach, available 24 hours. It will talk to you in Hindi and teach you English. Speak wrong 500 times, it will correct you 500 times. It will never say that you are not educated, you can't do it.]

scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: सच में कर पाऊंगी? [Will I really be able to do it?]

Character A says: एक महीने में आप बेटे का होमवर्क समझ पाओगी, टीचर से दो लाइन इंग्लिश में बोल पाओगी। पीटीएम में चुप नहीं बैठोगी। इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो, जनरल इंग्लिश शो खोलो, आज से शुरू करो बेटे के लिए। [In one month you will be able to understand your son's homework, speak two lines in English with the teacher. You won't sit quiet in the PTM. Download the English Seekho app, open the General English show, start from today for your son.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is centered vertically against a solid light purple background. The phone has a black bezel and a top notch. A rounded rectangular button shape sits below the phone. The composition is minimalistic with flat lighting.

scenes.visual_description: A graphic end-card featuring a smartphone mockup in the center against a light purple background. A call-to-action button is positioned below the phone. Text and logos are overlaid on the screen and button.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid black screen with no visible elements or lighting variations.

scenes.visual_description: A solid black screen displaying a large block of disclaimer text in white.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
